$S&P500 — CTO Plan
The devs planted the seed. The community owns the harvest.
Here’s how we run this:
🔒 Liquidity Locked — No funny business. LP is locked and verifiable. Check it yourself.
🖨️ Staking Live on printr xyz — Stake your $S&P500 and print rewards while we build. Holders get paid to wait.
📣 Community Marketing Push — We raid together. X posts, Telegram blasts, TikTok, CT influencer outreach. Every holder is a marketer.
📈 Chart Support — We buy dips as a unit. No paper hands, no panic sells. The index always goes up long term — same energy here.
🤝 Caller Outreach — We’re actively pitching to mid and large CT callers to get eyes on the chart.
🗳️ Holders Run This — Every major decision goes to the community. This is a decentralized play.

THE NEXT LEAP

But a galaxy is not a mission. A galaxy is a home — billions of stars, each one a community, each one a holder, each one burning with its own light. What comes with $TRUST?

• Transparency
• Fairness

Are you tired of getting rugged? I am too. That’s exactly why I created $TRUST, a project built on full transparency, starting with the tokenomics.

The team holds 56% of the total supply. Out of this:

• 50% is fully staked on Printr
• 3.5% is allocated for marketing and future exchange listings
• 2.5% is reserved as team supply

You might be wondering: How is this fair if 50% of the supply is staked, meaning the team would earn most of the rewards?

It’s simple. The top 75 stakers will receive 2.5x their staking rewards.

For example:
If you earn 1 SOL in staking rewards over 12 hours, you will automatically receive 2.5 SOL from us.

Distributions will take place every 12 hours, and only the top 75 stakers will qualify for the 2.5x bonus.

But that’s not all.
We will host daily X Spaces lasting between 3 to 6 hours. Everyone is welcome to join, ask questions, and engage, whether in the Spaces or in the X community.

We will also aim to trend daily on Dexscreener, and I will do everything in my power to take $TRUST to the multi-millions.

All we have to do is TRUST the process and BELIEF in each other.
